Video.summary: When Comanches kidnap her children, Mary Jane teams up with an Indian woman to save them.
Video.title: The Capture

Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: A salesman gets an unusual assignment: find the buyer of a custom-made silver piano.
Video.title: A Piano Goes West

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: Civil War loyalties are split when Southern sympathizers want to send gold to the Confederacy.
Video.title: Eruption at Volcano

Video.summary: The Rosetti family and fellow Italian immigrants look forward to new freedoms in the American West.
Video.title: The Invaders

Video.summary: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.
Video.title: The Blond King

Video.summary: As their crops dry out, desperate farmers seek help from the owner of a hydraulic mining machine.
Video.title: The Talking Wire

Video.summary: Russian Grand Duke Alexis is touring the West and the government assigns Buffalo Bill as his guide.
Video.title: The Grand Duke

Video.summary: After a skirmish with hostile Natives, prisoners arrive at the fort, including an ill girl.
Video.title: Indian Emily

Video.summary: The son of a Native chief faces trial after being accused of the murder of a fellow tribesman.
Video.title: Tribal Justice

Video.summary: Actor Edwin Booth faces discrimination due to his brother's assassination of President Lincoln.
Video.title: His Brother's Keeper

Video.summary: A Native chief's young widow fights an ancient ritual following her husband's death.
Video.title: Human Sacrifice

Video.summary: Indians attack on a wedding night.
Video.title: Pete Kitchen's Wedding Night

Video.summary: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.
Video.title: Splinter Station

Video.summary: A woman saves her husband from outlaws.
Video.title: The Gentle Sword

Video.summary: Fighting corrupt lawmen and vigilantes.
As the Donner Party attempts to cross the Sierra Nevada Mountains, and the Reed family is banished.
Video.title: A Girl Named Virginia

Video.summary: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.
Video.title: Gamble with Death

Video.summary: Dr. Allen Camden investigates the murder of likeable shopkeeper Grant Noble.
Video.title: Dead Man's Tale

Video.summary: A campaign to annex Oregon Territory.
Video.title: Who's Fer Divide?

Video.summary: Phillip Sheridan's friendship with a Native scout is questioned after ambushes leave troopers dead.
Video.title: The Red Petticoat

Video.summary: A colonel deals with Union deserters.
Video.title: The Deserters

Video.summary: Trappers look for an escape when they're imprisoned by the Mexican governor of San Diego.
Video.title: Price of a Passport

Video.summary: The end of the Mexican-American War leads to disputes between land-owning families and new settlers.
Video.title: Perilous Refuge

Video.summary: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist - until a stranger arrives.
Video.title: Forty Steps to Glory

Video.summary: In the years after California's conquest, an Army commander grapples with hostile citizens.
Video.title: Goodbye Five Hundred Pesos

Video.summary: A merchant looking to make more money fabricates reports of snowfall cutting off local supply lines.
Video.title: White Gold

Video.summary: When Claypool swindles McSween out of his gold mine, storekeeper Hobart has an idea for retribution.
Video.title: Loophole

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: A teacher engaged to a minister tries to conceal her gambling.
Video.title: Lottie's Legacy

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: George Parker's friend Michael encourages his rebellious ways and suggests he even change his name.
Video.title: Drop Out

Video.summary: Three orphaned children continue their parents' quest for gold.
Video.title: The Tenderfoot

Video.summary: A Mormon leader is determined to enforce God's law with a gun.
Video.title: Son of Thunder

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen
